rationale: Review 2 catches real naming problems visible in the diff, especially the content-claiming `unipotent_radical_trivial : True` field and the prime-suffixed wrapper lemma `ReductiveGroup.unipotentRadical_trivial'`, which would make the PR clearer if removed or renamed. Its broad `Is`-prefix convention claims are somewhat overstated, but acting on the decisive placeholder/projection naming findings would still improve the PR more than Review 1's approve.
